contracts.name: niffyinsure
contracts.notes: Testnet deployment. Set CONTRACT_ID_TESTNET env var. Run `sha256sum niffyinsure.wasm` after each build.

contracts.name: niffyinsure
contracts.notes: Mainnet deployment. CONTRACT_ID_MAINNET is REQUIRED at startup — server refuses to start without it.

contracts.name: niffyinsure
contracts.notes: Futurenet deployment. Set CONTRACT_ID_FUTURENET env var.
